hero.title: Ace Your Angular Interview
hero.description: Prepare for Angular frontend interviews with topic-wise guides, coding problems, architecture concepts, and real-world scenarios used by top tech companies.

angular architecture.description: Master modules, components, services, dependency injection, and Angular CLI.

components & templates.description: Component lifecycle, data binding, directives, pipes, and template syntax.

services & dependency injection.description: Creating services, DI hierarchy, providers, and singleton patterns.

routing & navigation.description: Route configuration, guards, resolvers, lazy loading, and nested routes.

forms in angular.description: Template-driven forms, reactive forms, form validation, and dynamic forms.

rxjs & observables.description: Observables, operators, subjects, and reactive programming patterns.

state management.description: NgRx, Akita, NGXS, services with subjects, and state patterns.

http & apis.description: HttpClient, interceptors, error handling, and API integration patterns.

performance optimization.description: Change detection, OnPush strategy, lazy loading, and bundle optimization.

testing in angular.description: Jasmine, Karma, TestBed, component testing, and e2e with Protractor.

angular directives & pipes.description: Custom directives, structural directives, attribute directives, and pure/impure pipes.

real-world projects & problems.description: Real interview questions, component building, and full application scenarios.

seo.title: Angular Interview Preparation Guide | Frontend Developer
seo.description: Comprehensive interview preparation for Angular developer roles: components, services, RxJS, state management, reactive forms, routing, testing, and real-world applications.
